Kshitij Gurbuxani

Software Developer.

I enjoy problem-solving challenges and team-building situations and I am eager to apply my academic knowledge and practical experience to real-world challenges in dynamic and growth-oriented environments.

Services I provide

Since the beginning of my journey as a designer and developer, I have honed skills in programming languages like Python, JavaScript, and SQL, developed expertise in front-end frameworks such as React and Vue, and excelled in UI/UX design with tools like Figma and Adobe XD. Additionally, I have expanded my knowledge in data analysis and machine learning, collaborating with talented individuals to deliver impactful digital solutions.

I offer from a wide range of services, including design, programming and teaching.

Projects

A C++ project recreating classic offline games like Google Dino and Snake, adding unique twists with enhanced visual effects and a redesigned UI, while keeping the core gameplay mechanics intact for a familiar yet refreshed experience.

A football statistics website project which focused on delivering an improved user experience and insightful football statistics through careful planning and execution.

A Java and DBMS-based project developed to manage and display IPL statistics, focusing on efficient data storage, retrieval, and user-friendly presentation of cricket stats.

A student master data management website for an NGO, serving as a central hub for students, parents, and teachers. It provides a secure, digitized interface for accessing and managing student information, focusing on efficient data storage, easy retrieval, and a user-friendly experience to enhance communication and engagement.

Get in Touch

Whether you have a question, want to start a project, or just want to connect, feel free to reach out. I’d love to hear from you and am always open to discussing new opportunities.
